meaning: n.呼叫者,传唤员,访客,召集员adj.新鲜的
examples: Features include caller ID and three-way calling.
The cell phone's caller ID readout told her Frank Montoya was on the line.
Phone: Make calls, answer calls, hear the caller ID and manage their call log.
Another caller said they had been blamed by their mother for their abusive father's imprisonment.
